review_text: I felt like just a file number to Mr. Harris. Got my matter resolved, but the experience left a lot to be desired in terms of personal attention and empathy.
owner_response: We're sorry the experience felt impersonal. We truly do care about each client's situation and will reflect on how to better convey that.

review_text: Attorney Walsh handled my case but the billing was confusing and I felt overcharged for routine phone calls. The outcome was acceptable but I left feeling like I was nickel-and-dimed throughout the process.
owner_response: We appreciate your feedback and take billing transparency seriously. We would welcome the opportunity to review your itemized statement with you.

review_text: Mr. Harris got the job done but barely. I had to repeat myself multiple times and felt like I wasn't a priority. For the money I paid I expected more attentiveness.
owner_response: Thank you for taking the time to share this. Client communication is something we continuously work to improve.

review_text: I gave their team two stars because while they were professional, the strategy they took on my case felt wrong in hindsight. Not sure I'd trust them with anything complex again.
The attorney handling my divorce case through the practice was technically skilled but emotionally cold. Going through a divorce is already devastating — I needed more compassion than I got.
The result of my case was not what Attorney Walsh led me to expect. I understand outcomes aren't guaranteed but the disconnect between early expectations and reality was significant.
Had a frustrating experience with their team. The attorney seemed competent but communication was poor. I often had to chase them down for updates. Took much longer than expected.
Months went by with no meaningful progress. Attorney Walsh always had a reason for the delays but it got old fast. Eventually things worked out but the timeline was unacceptable.
The legal work was fine but their team overcharged and was slow to respond to emails. I've worked with other attorneys who were more proactive. Wouldn't use them again.
I felt dismissed during consultations with Mr. Patel. My questions were answered quickly without much depth. The case resolved okay but I never felt confident in the representation.
